mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT hd.*, CONCAT(tl.`name`,"(",tl.`code`,")") AS laboratoryName FROM hk_camera hd LEFT JOIN hk_camera_laboratory_instrument_rel hr ON hd.index_code = hr.camera LEFT JOIN test_laboratory tl ON hr.test_laboratory_id = tl.id ) tba
1=1
AND tba.name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{name},'%')
AND tba.region_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{position},'%')
AND tba.laboratoryName is not null
AND tba.laboratoryName is null
